parameters.jsCode:
// Critical: Notify all channels immediately
const incident = $input.first().json;

const urgentMsg = `🚨🚨🚨 *CRITICAL INCIDENT*\n\n` +
  `🔑 ID: \`${incident.incidentId}\`\n` +
  `⚡ Severity: 🔴 CRITICAL (${incident.severityScore}/100)\n` +
  `📋 Type: ${incident.type}\n` +
  `📝 ${incident.title}\n\n` +
  `${incident.description.substring(0, 500)}\n\n` +
  (incident.contractAddress ? `🔑 Contract: \`${incident.contractAddress}\`\n` : '') +
  (incident.chain ? `⛓ Chain: ${incident.chain}\n` : '') +
  `\n🕐 Detected: ${incident.detectedAt}\n` +
  `\n⚠️ *IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED*\n` +
  `All on-call team members must respond within 15 minutes.`;

return [{ json: { ...incident, notificationMessage: urgentMsg, channels: ['team', 'management', 'oncall'] } }];

// Generate post-mortem template
const incident = $('Classify Severity').first().json;
const timeline = $('Update Timeline').first().json.timeline;

const template = `# Post-Mortem Report

` +
  `## Incident: ${incident.incidentId}

` +
  `**Date:** ${incident.detectedAt}
` +
  `**Severity:** ${incident.severity}
` +
  `**Type:** ${incident.type}
` +
  `**Status:** RESOLVED / ONGOING

` +
  `## Summary

` +
  `${incident.title}

` +
  `${incident.description}

` +
  `## Timeline

` +
  timeline.map(t => `- **${t.timestamp}** — ${t.event}: ${t.details}`).join('
') + '

' +
  `## Root Cause

` +
  `_[To be filled during post-mortem]_

` +
  `## Impact

` +
  `- Affected systems: 
` +
  `- Affected users: 
` +
  `- Financial impact: 

` +
  `## Resolution

` +
  `_[Steps taken to resolve]_

` +
  `## Action Items

` +
  `- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

` +
  `## Lessons Learned

` +
  `_[Key takeaways]_
`;

return [{ json: { incidentId: incident.incidentId, postMortemTemplate: template } }];

parameters.name: text
parameters.value:
📝 *Post-Mortem Template Created*

🔑 Incident: `{{ $json.incidentId }}`

A post-mortem template has been generated and attached to the incident ticket.

Please complete the template within 48 hours of resolution.
